name: Acts in Client Best Interest
description: Every AI-supported recommendation is assessed against the overarching MiFID II obligation to act in the client's best interest.
rationale: ESMA ¶7: central to the use of AI is the unwavering commitment to act in clients' best interest — an overarching requirement that applies irrespective of the tools the firm adopts.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
